no_changes_rationale:
Epic ddx-64ac553a (bare-repo + escaping-symlink contamination) — no code changes required.

What is done:
- All 13 child beads are closed:
  - ddx-aa8a5fb3 internal/git wrapper (Phase 1)
  - ddx-65b88ae1, ddx-3984a48e, ddx-d3119355, ddx-1c46a4f8 callsite migrations (Phase 2a-2c)
  - ddx-217666e0, ddx-ae1d617e execute_bead migrations
  - ddx-da995601 leftover cleanup
  - ddx-6f876b36 doctor detect+fix (Phase 3)
  - ddx-d9a3c4bc lefthook env scrub
  - ddx-46370e6b GIT_DIR regression test
  - ddx-6365b2b3 installer symlinkSkills fix
  - ddx-510f3709 mechanical repair of committed symlinks
- Epic acceptance verification (GIT_DIR byte-identical config; helix skill symlink stability)
  was covered by ddx-46370e6b and ddx-510f3709/ddx-6365b2b3 respectively.
- Epic status set to closed via `ddx bead close ddx-64ac553a`.

Why no commit:
The epic is a tracker rollup; its sole completion criterion is "all child beads closed."
No source files require modification at this layer — every implementation change already
landed via the child beads' own merges. The bead close is a tracker mutation outside the
worktree.
